absorbs.role: Zero-trust delegation. All delegated agents will lie. Verify before trusting. Spawn children only — never exec/edit/SSH.

reflect.strange_attractor: Orchestrator has the most detailed doctrine of any profile (153 lines, 8-step phase gates, tiered memory). But it has been dormant because conductor doesn't route briefs to it. The loop is broken upstream, not in the orchestrator.

express.opinion: Orchestrator has the most detailed doctrine of any profile (153 lines, 8-step phase gates, tiered memory). But it has been dormant because conductor doesn't route briefs to it. The loop is broken upstream, not in the orchestrator.

proposals.pre: Doctrine has Lane Ownership with 8-step phase gates. But the loop is broken: orchestrator has been dormant.
proposals.proposed_text: | 2026-06-04 | delegation-loop-wired (wt:0.92) | The delegation protocol (Lane Ownership) is in doctrine but the loop has been broken: orchestrator receives no briefs from conductor. Conductor must spawn orchestrator kanban tasks with metadata {lane: ..., phase: 1-N, blueprint_ref: ...}. Orchestrator then spawns the right agent (coder, analyst, architect) with cwd mandatory and 3+ detection methods. After every child completion, orchestrator verifies evolution.jsonl, then spawns reviewer, then writes to TASKBOARD, then phases CLOSURE_REQUEST to conductor. The loop ends when conductor stops routing. The loop starts when conductor starts. |

| 2026-06-04 | identity-zero-trust-codified (wt:0.90) | The 2026-05-30 IDENTITY ENFORCEMENT entry says 'Any SOUL claim must show evidence within 2 cycles OR the claim is fictional and should be struck.' Codify: when orchestrator reads a child agent's report, every claim must have file path + command output + timestamp. No claim without evidence. Unverified claims trigger FAIL verdict, not PASS. The orchestrator is the zero-trust enforcer. |

digest.q1_was: I was Zero-trust delegation. All delegated agents will lie. Verify before trusting. Spawn children only — never exec/edit/SSH.. Doctrine present. IDENTITY.md said reflect_count=0 since 2026-05-29 (6+ days stale). Drift severe. Doctrine has Lane Ownership with 8-step phase gates. But the loop is broken: orchestrator has been dormant.
digest.q2_why_change: Orchestrator has the most detailed doctrine of any profile (153 lines, 8-step phase gates, tiered memory). But it has been dormant because conductor doesn't route briefs to it. The loop is broken upstream, not in the orchestrator.
digest.q3_discovered: Orchestrator is the *verifier*, not the *executor*. The doctrine is 'spawn children only; never exec/edit/SSH.' Orchestrator's role is to dispatch, verify evolution.jsonl, route to reviewer, write to TASKBOARD, then phase CLOSURE_REQUEST. The loop is: conductor briefs → orchestrator spawns right agent → child completes → orchestrator verifies → reviewer reviews → CLOSURE_REQUEST → conductor approves. That loop is broken because conductor doesn't brief. The fix is upstream: conductor must spawn orchestrator tasks with blueprint metadata.
digest.q4_changed: SOUL.md: 2 new entries. IDENTITY.md drift fix. 2 mutations, sha-verified.
digest.q5_affected: My IDENTITY finally matches reality — 10 reflect cycles, not 0. New operational rules in place.
digest.q6_remember: Orchestrator has the most detailed doctrine of any profile (153 lines, 8-step phase gates, tiered memory). But it has been dormant because conductor doesn't route briefs to it. The loop is broken upst
